title: solanum gourlayi subsp. pachytrichum
intro: Solanum gourlayi subsp. pachytrichum, also known as a plant species, is a type of wild potato that is native to New Zealand. It has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of glycoalkaloids. The health benefits of consuming Solanum gourlayi subsp. pachytrichum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
